full_text:
Zeng Xia жӣҫеӨҸ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zeng Xia (жӣҫеӨҸ). Opposed the Wu government for over ten years, but surrendered after Zhongli Mu sent an envoy to him. Zeng Xia was affiliated with Jieyang and the Wu Kingdom.
